dependencies.relationship: Existing CLI commands, flag handling, and resolve functions from spec 03 are prerequisites for implementing config-layer wiring in this spec.

task_groups.title: Write tests: config auto-creation and TOML structure (REQ-1, REQ-2)

subtasks.title: Write unit tests for config directory and file auto-creation (TS-05-1, TS-05-2, TS-05-3)
details: Create test file internal/cliconfig/autocreate_test.go.
TS-05-1: Call ensureConfigExists(homeDir) on a fresh temp dir; assert $HOME/.af/ exists with 0700 and config.toml exists with 0600 containing hub_url = "" and comment header.
TS-05-2: Pre-create config.toml with custom content; call ensureConfigExists; assert content and mtime are unchanged.
TS-05-3: Pre-create $HOME/.af/ (0755) and config.toml (0644); call ensureConfigExists; assert permissions are NOT changed to 0700/0600.

subtasks.title: Write unit tests for config auto-creation error paths (TS-05-E1, TS-05-E2, TS-05-E3)
details: TS-05-E1: chmod homeDir to 0500; assert ensureConfigExists returns non-nil error whose message contains the .af path.
TS-05-E2: mkdir $HOME/.af/ with 0500 (no write); assert ensureConfigExists returns error referencing config.toml.
TS-05-E3: Inject a write-failing writer; assert ensureConfigExistsWithWriter returns error and config.toml does not exist (partial file removed).

subtasks.title: Write unit tests for TOML config struct parsing (TS-05-4, TS-05-5, TS-05-6)
details: Create test file internal/cliconfig/config_test.go.
TS-05-4: Write config with hub_url and api_key; assert loadConfig returns struct with matching HubURL and APIKey.
TS-05-5: Write config with [keys.my-project] section; assert cfg.Keys["my-project"] has correct KeyID, Token, Label.
TS-05-6: Write config with hub_url = "" and api_key = ""; assert resolveHubURL returns error and resolveAPIKey returns error.

subtasks.title: Write unit tests for TOML parse error and missing key fallthrough (TS-05-E4, TS-05-E5)
details: TS-05-E4: Write invalid TOML to config.toml; assert loadConfig returns non-nil error containing the file path and parse failure description.
TS-05-E5: Set cfg.APIKey = "nonexistent-slug" with empty Keys map; assert resolveAPIKey returns error and empty string token.

checks: All test functions in internal/cliconfig/autocreate_test.go and internal/cliconfig/config_test.go compile without errors: go build ./internal/cliconfig/...
Tests for this group fail (red) before implementation: go test ./internal/cliconfig/... -count=1 -v
No linter warnings introduced: go vet ./internal/cliconfig/...

task_groups.title: Write tests: resolution precedence and atomic writes (REQ-3, REQ-4)

subtasks.title: Write unit tests for hub URL and API key resolution precedence (TS-05-7, TS-05-8, TS-05-9)
details: Create internal/cliconfig/resolve_test.go.
TS-05-7: Test all four hub URL resolution scenarios: flag wins, env wins, config wins, all empty → error.
TS-05-8: Test all four API key resolution scenarios: flag wins, env wins, config+keys lookup wins, no source → error.
TS-05-9: Assert error message from resolveHubURL (all empty) contains 'config.toml', '--hub-url', and 'AF_HUB_URL'.

subtasks.title: Write unit tests for atomic config write mechanics (TS-05-10, TS-05-11)
details: Create internal/cliconfig/atomic_write_test.go.
TS-05-10: Inject spy for os.CreateTemp and os.Rename; trigger setDefaultKey; assert createTemp called in $HOME/.af/, rename destination is config.toml, and temp file is gone after operation.
TS-05-11: Trigger mutation and capture temp file permissions before rename; assert temp file has permissions 0600.

subtasks.title: Write unit tests for atomic write failure paths (TS-05-E6, TS-05-E7)
details: TS-05-E6: Stub os.Rename to always fail; assert original config.toml unchanged, temp file removed, error returned.
TS-05-E7: Stub os.CreateTemp to always fail; assert original config.toml unchanged, error returned.

subtasks.title: Write property-based tests for resolution and atomic write invariants (TS-05-P1, TS-05-P3, TS-05-P4)
details: Create internal/cliconfig/properties_test.go.
TS-05-P1: For random non-empty flag/env values, assert resolveHubURL always returns flag/env value, never config value.
TS-05-P3: For random mutations, assert config.toml snapshot at any point is always valid TOML (old or new content).
TS-05-P4: For config with empty hub_url/api_key and empty flag/env, assert resolution returns error not empty string.

checks: All test files in internal/cliconfig/ compile: go build ./internal/cliconfig/...
Resolution and atomic write tests are red before implementation: go test ./internal/cliconfig/... -run 'TestResolve|TestAtomic|TestProperty' -count=1 -v
No linter warnings: go vet ./internal/cliconfig/...

task_groups.title: Write tests: command config side-effects and keys default (REQ-5 through REQ-9)

subtasks.title: Write integration tests for afc login config writes (TS-05-12, TS-05-13, TS-05-14, TS-05-E8)
details: Create internal/integration/login_test.go.
TS-05-12: Mock POST /api/v1/auth/callback returning user + api_key; run login; assert [keys._login] with key_id, token, label='login' and api_key='_login'.
TS-05-13: Pre-set hub_url=''; run login; assert hub_url is updated to login URL.
TS-05-14: Pre-set hub_url='https://existing.example.com'; run login with different --hub-url; assert hub_url unchanged.
TS-05-E8: Mock callback returns no api_key field; assert exit non-zero, stderr mentions missing credential data, config.toml unchanged.

subtasks.title: Write integration tests for keys create, refresh, revoke config writes (TS-05-15, TS-05-16, TS-05-17, TS-05-18)
details: Create internal/integration/keys_test.go.
TS-05-15: Run keys create --workspace my-project; assert [keys.my-project] section added with key_id and token.
TS-05-16: Pre-set [keys.my-project] with old token; run keys refresh a1b2c3; assert token updated, key_id unchanged.
TS-05-17: Pre-set [keys.staging] where api_key is different; run keys revoke f7e8d9; assert [keys.staging] removed, api_key unchanged.
TS-05-18: Pre-set api_key='my-project', [keys.my-project] key_id='a1b2c3'; run keys revoke a1b2c3; assert api_key cleared, [keys.my-project] removed, warning on stderr mentions 'afc keys default'.

subtasks.title: Write unit/integration tests for keys refresh/revoke error paths (TS-05-E9, TS-05-E10)
details: TS-05-E9: No config entry for key_id='deadbeef'; mock API refreshes successfully; assert exit 0, warning on stderr contains 'deadbeef' or 'not found'.
TS-05-E10: No config entry for key_id='cafebabe'; mock API revokes successfully; assert exit 0, warning on stderr contains 'cafebabe' or 'not found'.

subtasks.title: Write unit tests for afc keys default command (TS-05-19, TS-05-20, TS-05-E11, TS-05-E12)
details: Create internal/cli/keys_default_test.go.
TS-05-19: [keys.my-project] exists; run 'keys default my-project'; assert api_key='my-project', confirmation on stdout.
TS-05-20: [keys._login] exists; run 'keys default _login'; assert api_key='_login'.
TS-05-E11: No [keys.nonexistent]; run 'keys default nonexistent'; assert exit non-zero, stderr contains 'nonexistent', api_key unchanged.
TS-05-E12: Run 'keys default' with no argument; assert exit non-zero, stderr contains usage/workspace-slug.

subtasks.title: Write property and backward-compat tests (TS-05-P2, TS-05-P5, TS-05-P6, TS-05-22, TS-05-23, TS-05-24)
details: TS-05-P2: For any fresh homeDir, assert $HOME/.af/ gets 0700 and config.toml gets 0600 on creation.
TS-05-P5: For each non-mutating command, assert config.toml content and mtime are unchanged after invocation.
TS-05-P6: For random slugs not in cfg.Keys, assert 'keys default <slug>' exits non-zero and api_key is unchanged.
TS-05-22: resolveCredentials with both flags set; assert flag values used, config ignored.
TS-05-23: resolveHubURL with --hub-url flag; assert flag value returned not config value. Same for AF_HUB_URL.
TS-05-24: resolveAPIKey with --api-key flag; assert flag value returned not config lookup. Same for AF_HUB_API_KEY.

Command config side-effect tests are red before implementation: go test ./internal/integration/... ./internal/cli/... -count=1 -v
No linter warnings: go vet ./internal/integration/... ./internal/cli/...

task_groups.title: Write tests: server auth callback and smoke tests (REQ-10, smoke paths)

subtasks.title: Write integration test for server POST /api/v1/auth/callback api_key response (TS-05-21)
details: Create internal/integration/auth_callback_test.go.
POST /api/v1/auth/callback with valid OAuth payload; assert HTTP 200, body JSON has user != null, api_key.key matches '^af_[a-f0-9]+_', api_key.key_id matches '^[a-f0-9]+$'.

subtasks.title: Write smoke test scaffolding for first-time login and workspace list (TS-05-SMOKE-1)
details: Create internal/integration/smoke_test.go.

TS-05-SMOKE-1: From a clean temp home dir, run afc login with mocked OAuth callback; assert $HOME/.af/ (0700), config.toml (0600), [keys._login] section, api_key='_login', hub_url set. Then run workspace list with no flags and assert exit 0.

subtasks.title: Write smoke tests for keys create+default, revoke-default-key, and backward-compat paths (TS-05-SMOKE-2, TS-05-SMOKE-3, TS-05-SMOKE-4)
details: TS-05-SMOKE-2: Run keys create --workspace my-project (mock API); assert [keys.my-project] added. Run keys default my-project; assert api_key='my-project', exit 0.
TS-05-SMOKE-3: Pre-set api_key='my-project'; run keys revoke a1b2c3d4e5f6; assert [keys.my-project] removed, api_key='', warning on stderr.
TS-05-SMOKE-4: Run workspace list --hub-url https://hub.example.com --api-key af_abc123_secret; assert exit 0, config.toml unmodified.

subtasks.title: Write smoke test for malformed config immediate exit (TS-05-SMOKE-5) and property test TS-05-P7
details: TS-05-SMOKE-5: Write invalid TOML to config.toml; run any afc command; assert exit non-zero, stderr contains config.toml path and parse error description, no API calls made.
TS-05-P7: For any (flag, env, cfg) combination, instrument resolveHubURL and resolveAPIKey to count state transitions; assert steps <= 3 for hub URL and <= 4 for API key.

checks: All smoke and server test files compile: go build ./internal/integration/...
Smoke tests are red before implementation: go test ./internal/integration/... -run 'TestSmoke' -count=1 -v
No linter warnings: go vet ./internal/integration/...

task_groups.title: Implement config package: types, auto-creation, and TOML load/save

subtasks.title: Define Config struct and TOML field mappings
details: Create internal/cliconfig/config.go.
Define Config struct with fields: HubURL string `toml:"hub_url"`, APIKey string `toml:"api_key"`, Keys map[string]KeyEntry `toml:"keys"`.
Define KeyEntry struct with KeyID string `toml:"key_id"`, Token string `toml:"token"`, Label string `toml:"label"`.
Implement loadConfig(homeDir string) (*Config, error) using toml.DecodeFile; return descriptive error on parse failure including file path.

subtasks.title: Implement ensureConfigExists with correct permissions and initial content
details: Implement ensureConfigExists(homeDir string) error in internal/cliconfig/autocreate.go.
Check if config.toml exists; if so, return nil immediately (no permission changes).
Create $HOME/.af/ with os.MkdirAll and permission 0700 if not present.
Create config.toml with os.OpenFile(path, os.O_CREATE|os.O_EXCL|os.O_WRONLY, 0600); write comment header and hub_url = "".
On write failure, remove partial file (deferred cleanup) and return error.

subtasks.title: Implement atomic config write (writeConfigAtomic)
details: Implement writeConfigAtomic(homeDir string, cfg *Config) error in internal/cliconfig/atomic_write.go.
Use os.CreateTemp(homeDir+'/.af/', 'config-*.toml') to create temp file.
chmod temp file to 0600 before writing.
Encode cfg to temp file using toml.NewEncoder; close temp file.
Defer os.Remove(tempPath) to clean up if subsequent steps fail.
Call os.Rename(tempPath, configPath) to atomically replace; on success cancel the deferred remove.

subtasks.title: Implement hub URL and API key resolution functions
details: Implement resolveHubURL(flagVal, envVal string, cfg *Config) (string, error) in internal/cliconfig/resolve.go.
Priority: flagVal != '' → return flagVal; envVal != '' → return envVal; cfg.HubURL != '' → return cfg.HubURL; else error mentioning config.toml, --hub-url, AF_HUB_URL.
Implement resolveAPIKey(flagVal, envVal string, cfg *Config) (string, error).

Priority: flagVal != '' → return flagVal; envVal != '' → return envVal; cfg.APIKey != '' → look up cfg.Keys[cfg.APIKey].Token (if missing, fall through); else error mentioning config.toml, --api-key, AF_HUB_API_KEY.

subtasks.title: Wire config initialization into CLI startup (cobra PersistentPreRunE)
details: In the root cobra command's PersistentPreRunE, call ensureConfigExists(homeDir) then loadConfig(homeDir).
Store loaded config in cobra command context or a package-level variable accessible to subcommands.
On loadConfig error, print descriptive parse error to stderr and return non-zero exit.
Pass loaded config to resolveHubURL and resolveAPIKey; override with --hub-url/AF_HUB_URL and --api-key/AF_HUB_API_KEY as highest-priority sources.

checks: Unit tests for config package pass: go test ./internal/cliconfig/... -count=1 -v
All existing tests still pass: go test ./... -count=1
No linter warnings: go vet ./internal/cliconfig/...
Requirements 05-REQ-1.1, 05-REQ-1.2, 05-REQ-1.3, 05-REQ-2.1, 05-REQ-2.2, 05-REQ-2.3, 05-REQ-3.1, 05-REQ-3.2, 05-REQ-3.3, 05-REQ-4.1, 05-REQ-4.2 acceptance criteria met

task_groups.title: Implement config mutation helpers for key management commands

subtasks.title: Implement writeLoginKey and conditional hub_url write for afc login
details: Implement writeLoginKey(homeDir string, cfg *Config, keyID, token, loginHubURL string) error in internal/cliconfig/mutations.go.
Add or overwrite cfg.Keys['_login'] = KeyEntry{KeyID: keyID, Token: token, Label: 'login'}.
Set cfg.APIKey = '_login'.
If cfg.HubURL == '', set cfg.HubURL = loginHubURL.
Call writeConfigAtomic(homeDir, cfg).
In the login command, assert api_key field is present in callback response; if absent or malformed, return error without calling writeLoginKey.

subtasks.title: Implement addKeyEntry for afc keys create config side-effect
details: Implement addKeyEntry(homeDir string, cfg *Config, workspaceSlug, keyID, token, label string) error in internal/cliconfig/mutations.go.
Add cfg.Keys[workspaceSlug] = KeyEntry{KeyID: keyID, Token: token, Label: label}.
Call writeConfigAtomic(homeDir, cfg).
Hook into the existing afc keys create cobra command's RunE after successful API call.

subtasks.title: Implement updateKeyToken for afc keys refresh config side-effect
details: Implement updateKeyToken(homeDir string, cfg *Config, keyID, newToken string) error in internal/cliconfig/mutations.go.
Iterate cfg.Keys to find the entry whose KeyID == keyID; update its Token field.
If no entry found, print warning to stderr ('key <keyID> not found in local config, skipping update') and return nil.
Call writeConfigAtomic(homeDir, cfg) only if a matching entry was found.
Hook into the existing afc keys refresh cobra command's RunE after successful API call.

subtasks.title: Implement removeKeyEntry for afc keys revoke config side-effect
details: Implement removeKeyEntry(homeDir string, cfg *Config, keyID string, stderr io.Writer) error in internal/cliconfig/mutations.go.
Iterate cfg.Keys to find the entry whose KeyID == keyID; note its workspace slug.
If not found, print warning to stderr and return nil.
Delete the entry from cfg.Keys.
If the deleted slug == cfg.APIKey, clear cfg.APIKey = '' and print warning to stderr: 'Default key removed; run afc keys default <workspace-slug> to set a new default.'
Call writeConfigAtomic(homeDir, cfg).
Hook into existing afc keys revoke cobra command's RunE after successful API call.

checks: Integration tests for login and keys commands pass: go test ./internal/integration/... -run 'TestLogin|TestKeys' -count=1 -v
All existing tests still pass: go test ./... -count=1
No linter warnings: go vet ./internal/cliconfig/... ./internal/integration/...
Requirements 05-REQ-5.1, 05-REQ-5.2, 05-REQ-5.3, 05-REQ-6.1, 05-REQ-7.1, 05-REQ-8.1, 05-REQ-8.2 acceptance criteria met

task_groups.title: Implement afc keys default command and server auth callback extension

subtasks.title: Implement setDefaultKey for afc keys default command
details: Implement setDefaultKey(homeDir string, cfg *Config, workspaceSlug string) error in internal/cliconfig/mutations.go.
Check that cfg.Keys[workspaceSlug] exists; if not, return descriptive error (do not modify config).
Set cfg.APIKey = workspaceSlug; call writeConfigAtomic(homeDir, cfg).
Print confirmation message to stdout: 'Default API key set to <workspaceSlug>'.

subtasks.title: Register afc keys default cobra command
details: Create internal/cli/keys_default.go with a cobra.Command for 'keys default <workspace-slug>'.
Mark <workspace-slug> as a required positional arg (Args: cobra.ExactArgs(1)); cobra will print usage and exit non-zero if missing.
In RunE: load config, call setDefaultKey, handle errors by printing to stderr and returning non-zero exit.
Register the command as a child of the keys cobra command.

subtasks.title: Extend server POST /api/v1/auth/callback to return api_key in response
details: In the server-side auth callback handler, after OAuth token exchange, create or retrieve an API key for the authenticated user.
Extend the response JSON struct to include an APIKey field: struct { Key string `json:"key"`, KeyID string `json:"key_id"` }.
Return HTTP 200 with {"user": {...}, "api_key": {"key": "af_<key_id>_<secret>", "key_id": "<key_id>"}}.
Ensure backward compatibility: the user field remains unchanged in shape.

subtasks.title: Update CLI login command to parse and store api_key from callback response
details: In the afc login command's OAuth callback handler, parse api_key.key and api_key.key_id from the response body.
If api_key field is absent or any required subfield is empty, return error to stderr: 'login response missing api_key credential data'; do not modify config.
On success, call writeLoginKey(homeDir, cfg, keyID, token, hubURL).
Print confirmation to stdout: 'Logged in successfully. Config saved to ~/.af/config.toml'.

Run spec-specific tests: go test ./internal/cliconfig/... ./internal/cli/... ./internal/integration/... -count=1 -v.
Confirm backward-compat tests TS-05-22, TS-05-23, TS-05-24 all pass (flags/env vars override config).

subtasks.title: Run property-based tests and confirm invariants hold
details: Run property tests: go test ./internal/cliconfig/... -run 'TestProperty' -count=5 -v.

Confirm PROP-1 (flag/env always wins), PROP-2 (permissions at creation), PROP-3 (atomic writes), PROP-4 (empty string fallthrough), PROP-5 (only designated commands modify config), PROP-6 (keys default rejects non-existent slugs) all pass.

subtasks.title: Confirm no regressions in existing CLI commands
details: Run all upstream CLI tests from spec 03: go test ./... -count=1.
Manually verify that --hub-url and --api-key flags still work for workspace list, workspace create, and keys list commands.
Verify AF_HUB_URL and AF_HUB_API_KEY environment variables still override config file values as expected.

subtasks.title: Update docs/cli.md with keys default command and config auto-creation notes
details: Add 'afc keys default <workspace-slug>' to the keys sub-command section with description, argument table, preconditions, and error behavior.
Add a note to 'afc login', 'afc keys create', 'afc keys refresh', and 'afc keys revoke' entries explaining they automatically update $HOME/.af/config.toml.
Add a 'Configuration' section noting that config.toml is auto-created on first run.

subtasks.title: Update docs/configuration.md with full client configuration reference
details: Add 'Client Configuration' section documenting: file location ($HOME/.af/config.toml), TOML structure with field definitions table, resolution precedence order for hub_url and api_key.

Document auto-creation behavior (directory 0700, file 0600, initial content), atomic write strategy, file permissions, and security considerations (plaintext storage, 0600 protection, single-user threat model).
Include an annotated example config.toml matching the PRD's Config File Structure section.

task_groups.title: Wiring verification: end-to-end integration and stub audit

subtasks.title: Trace execution paths and verify call chain continuity
details: PATH-1: Confirm root cobra PersistentPreRunE calls ensureConfigExists → loadConfig → resolveHubURL/resolveAPIKey; verify afc login RunE calls writeLoginKey after callback parse.
PATH-2: Confirm keys create RunE calls addKeyEntry after API success; confirm keys default RunE calls setDefaultKey.
PATH-3: Confirm keys revoke RunE calls removeKeyEntry; verify default-key-cleared warning path reaches stderr.
PATH-5: Confirm loadConfig error surfaces as immediate non-zero exit before any API call is attempted.
Use grep/code-search to confirm each function is called from production code, not only from tests.

subtasks.title: Verify return value propagation across the call chain
details: Confirm that errors from ensureConfigExists are propagated to PersistentPreRunE and cause non-zero exit.

Confirm that errors from writeConfigAtomic (CreateTemp or Rename failures) are returned from all mutation helpers (writeLoginKey, addKeyEntry, updateKeyToken, removeKeyEntry, setDefaultKey) and surfaced to the cobra RunE as non-zero exit.
Confirm that resolveHubURL and resolveAPIKey error strings reach stderr output in the CLI's error handling path.

subtasks.title: Run all smoke tests with real components
details: Run all smoke tests: go test ./internal/integration/... -run 'TestSmoke' -count=1 -v.
SMOKE-1: Assert clean-env login produces correct $HOME/.af/config.toml with 0700/0600 permissions and subsequent workspace list works without flags.
SMOKE-2: Assert keys create + keys default sequence produces correct api_key in config.
SMOKE-3: Assert keys revoke on default key clears api_key and emits warning.
SMOKE-4: Assert backward-compat flags bypass config file; config.toml is unmodified.
SMOKE-5: Assert malformed config causes immediate exit with parse error on stderr.

subtasks.title: Stub and dead-code audit
details: Search for Go stub markers: grep -rn 'panic("not implemented")' ./internal/cliconfig/ ./internal/cli/ — expect zero results.
Search for bare TODO comments on implemented functions: grep -rn '// TODO' ./internal/cliconfig/ ./internal/cli/ — review and resolve any that indicate incomplete implementation.
Verify no function in the config or cli packages has an empty body or a bare 'return nil' in a non-trivial path (e.g. writeConfigAtomic must actually call os.CreateTemp and os.Rename).
Confirm all cobra RunE functions for login, keys create, keys refresh, keys revoke, and keys default have their config mutation hooks wired (not commented out or stubbed).

subtasks.title: Cross-spec entry point verification (spec 03 dependency)
details: Confirm that the existing cobra commands for keys create, keys refresh, and keys revoke (owned by spec 03) have their RunE functions updated with config mutation calls from this spec.
Confirm these production RunE wiring changes are present in the spec 03 command files, not only as test doubles.
Run the full cross-spec test suite: go test ./... -count=1 and confirm zero failures.
